title: Air Products (APD) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Air Products' (APD) Q1 performance is likely to have been driven by improved cost structures & productivity actions amid headwinds from high power costs, softer volumes & adverse currency movements.

title: 3 Dividend Kings Among 22 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In First Half Of February
text: There is a slew of dividend increases coming in February, including from dividend kings Genuine Parts, 3M, and PepsiCo in the first half of the month. Other popular stocks that traditionally announce annual increases in early February are Sherwin-Williams and Cisco.

title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of January 29
text: A weekly summary of dividend activity for Dividend Champions, Contenders, and Challengers. Companies which changed their dividends.

title: Air Products Increases Quarterly Dividend by 8% to $1.75 Per Share
text: Move Marks 41 st Consecutive Year of Quarterly Dividend Increases on Company's Common Stock LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , Jan. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Air Products (NYSE: APD) has increased the quarterly dividend on the Company's common stock by 13 cents per share—from $1.62 to $1.75 per share—representing an eight percent increase.

title: 5 S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Ahead of Earnings Next Week
text: Five S&P 500 companies are set to beat earnings estimates next week. These are: JNPR, MSCI, IEX, APD and HOLX.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Why Air Products and Chemicals (APD) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Air Products and Chemicals (APD) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Air Products to Highlight its Latest Innovations in Cryogenic Freezing at the International Production & Processing Expo
text: LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , Jan. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE:APD) will highlight its latest innovations in freezing at the International Production & Processing Expo (IPPE) at the Georgia World Congress Center in Atlanta, Georgia from January 24-26.

title: Air Products, Aramco, ACWA Power, and Air Products Qudra Reach Financial Close and Transfer Second Group of Assets for $12 Billion Gasification and Power Joint Venture at Jazan, Saudi Arabia
text: LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , Jan. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products today announced financial close and transfer of the second group of assets for the $12 billion gasification and power joint venture (JV) with Aramco, ACWA Power and Air Products Qudra in the Jazan Economic City ("Jazan"), Saudi Arabia.

title: Nicholas Ward's Dividend Growth Portfolio: December/Full Year 2022 Review
text: My passive income was up by 46.50% on a year-over-year basis during December. For the full-year in 2022, my passive income rose by 23.73%.

title: These 15 Dividend Aristocrat stocks have been the best income builders
text: The S&P Dividend Aristocrats deserve more coverage.

title: Air Products Wins Sustainability Role Model Award 2022 in China
text: Company Recognized at China Philanthropy Festival for Eight Consecutive Years SHANGHAI , Jan. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE:APD), a world-leading industrial gases company serving China market for 35 years, has won the prestigious Sustainability Role Model Award 2022 at the 12th China Philanthropy Festival held in Shanghai on December 28-29 for its outstanding contributions to corporate social responsibility (CSR) and China's sustainable development. This marks the eighth consecutive year that the company has been recognized at this influential event.

title: Air Products' Economic, Environmental and Social Efforts Earn Place for Air Products on Dow Jones Sustainability North America Index for 13th Consecutive Year
text: LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , Jan. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE: APD) has earned a place on the Dow Jones Sustainability North America Index (DJSI) listing for the 13th consecutive year.

title: Air Products to Broadcast Fiscal 2023 First Quarter Earnings Teleconference on February 2, 2023
text: LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , Jan. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE:APD) will release its fiscal 2023 first quarter financial results prior to market open on Thursday, February 2, 2023 and will review these results in a teleconference at 8:30 a.m.

title: Air Products (APD) Up 24% in 3 Months: What's Driving the Rally?
text: Air Products (APD) gains on higher pricing in its key segments, improved merchant demand, investments in high-return projects and productivity actions.

title: BlackRock, Kimberly-Clark Among 13 Companies To Start 2023 With Annual Dividend Increases
text: There were several double-digit boosts in December, with Mastercard and Eli Lilly leading the way with 16% and 15% increases, respectively. Abbott Labs began its second half-century of dividend growth with an 8.5% increase.
